main.description: An index entry in the market registry's repo tracking a registered bidder. The registry creates one entry per (bidderDid, payloadNsid) pair when a bidder calls registerBidder. Liveness is determined by polling the bidder's own bidderDiscovery record — this index entry carries no heartbeat timestamps. When a bidder goes stale the registry deletes its index entries.

appliesTo.description: Payload NSIDs this bidder handles. Matches the appliesTo from the bidder's bidderDiscovery record at registration time.

indexedAt.description: When the registry created this index entry.
